return(function(D,P,L,G,Z,d,E,v,Y,V,x,M,N,w,R,X,F,c,O,H,q,r,g)H,N,v,q,F,M,O,x,R,c,w,g,X,r,Y,V={},function(D,i)local P=F(i)local L=function(L,G,Z)return r(D,{L;G;Z},i,P)end return L end,function(r,L,G,Z)local Q,E,U,V9,T,p,x9,H9,d9,M9,J,R9,D9,u,k,r9,A,w9,q,q9,K,c9,a,v9,l,I,o,h,G9,w,C,t,n,i9,O,e,F9,X9,m,L9,B,s,Z9,Y9,z,g9,f,j,P9,S,E9,F,N9,O9,g,b,y,W while r do if return P(E)end,function(D,i)local P=F(i)local L=function(L,G,Z,d,E)return r(D,{L;G,Z,d;E},i,P)end return L end,function(D,i)local P=F(i)local L=function(L,G,Z,d)return r(D,{L,G;Z,d},i,P)end return L end return(q(-421024+5282255,{}))(P(E))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[i(-91191-(-65783))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
